title: Advanced Cooking Techniques
description: This lesson covers advanced techniques such as sous-vide, fermentation, and molecular gastronomy. Users will learn how to apply these techniques in practical cooking scenarios.

steps.instruction: Introduction to Sous-vide cooking and its benefits.
How to set up a sous-vide immersion circulator.
Cooking a steak using sous-vide method.
Introduction to fermentation and its culinary uses.
How to ferment vegetables at home.
Understanding molecular gastronomy and its applications in modern cooking.
Creating a simple dish using molecular gastronomy techniques.
